title: uncinia angustifolia
intro: Uncinia angustifolia, also known as the New Zealand spike rush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Uncinia angustifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
